scripts.deploy: npm run build && node scripts/check-production.mjs && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name autodesign --branch main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.test: node scripts/check-intro-state.mjs && node scripts/check-scene-state.mjs && node scripts/check-scene-focus.mjs && node scripts/check-lifecycle.mjs && node scripts/check-site.mjs
scripts.test:production: npm run build && node scripts/check-production.mjs && SITE_ROOT=dist node scripts/check-browser.mjs
